name: Easy Amaretto Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 small Package Instant Vanilla Pudding Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle 1 cup of toasted almonds into the bottom of a well-greased and floured 10-inch tube pan; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cake mix, instant vanilla pudding mix, eggs, vegetable oil, water, amaretto, and almond extract. Beat on low speed of an electric mixer until dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Increase speed to medium, and beat for 4 minutes. Stir in the remaining 1/2 cup toasted almonds.
4. Pour batter into prepared tube pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool cake in pan for 10-15 minutes; remove from pan, and cool completely.
7. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, water, and butter. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to medium, and gently boil for 4-5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves.
8. Remove from heat, and let cool for 15 minutes. Stir in the remaining 1/4 cup amaretto and 1/2 teaspoon almond extract.
9. Punch holes in the top of the cake with a wooden pick; slowly pour the glaze over the top of the cake, allowing it to absorb into the cake.
